calendar.matters:
Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Report To Court
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheri Damon, in pro per.

After reminding the Petitioner that all pleadings must be filed with the Court before they can be reviewed by the Examiner, the Court granted the Petition appointing Sheri Damon the administrator with will annexed of the Estate of Albina Urbank, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: Judge John Dearman; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
